intro: Deep in the glittering cave, a single crystal floats in a shaft of light, humming a note you feel more than hear. It is listening for a wish.
title: The Wishing Crystal
description: A wish-crystal thrums with gathered luck. As you reach for it, the light settles into a {{tierName}}-tier glow - that is the strength of the blessing it will grant. Now choose what to wish for: power, fortune, or protection.

1.label: Wish for power
1.tooltip: (+) Offensive gifts scaled to the rolled tier (+ a Morale Banner on a high roll)
1.selected: The crystal flares red-gold, and strength pours into your team.

2.label: Wish for fortune
2.tooltip: (+) Lucky gifts scaled to the rolled tier (+ a Coin Purse on a high roll)
2.selected: The crystal shimmers gold, and fortune turns your way.

3.label: Wish for protection
3.tooltip: (+) Protective gifts scaled to the rolled tier (+ a Field Medic on a high roll)
3.selected: The crystal glows a steady blue, and a warm ward settles over your team.
